description: Send notifications to your own HomeAssistant destination through the UnitySVC gateway. POST the unified message envelope {title, body, type, format}; the gateway composes an Apprise hassios:// URL from your stored secrets and delivers via apprise.unitysvc.dev. The free apprise channel uses your own stored credentials; the apprise-plus channel binds extra per-enrollment destinations via parameters. The gateway channels skip Apprise and transform the envelope into a native HomeAssistant persistent_notification payload delivered straight to your HA instance.
name: msg-to-homeassistant

request.template: {"urls":"hassios://${ customer_secrets.{{ params.host_secret }} }/${ customer_secrets.{{ params.accesstoken_secret }} }","title":{* _escape_json(_body.title or "") *},"body":{* _escape_json(_body.body or "") *},"type":{* _escape_json(_body.type or "info") *},"format":{* _escape_json(_body.format or "text") *}}
{"message":{* _escape_json((_body.body or "")..(((_body.title or "")~="" and (_body.body or "")~="") and "" or "")) *},"title":{* _escape_json(_body.title or "") *}}
{"message":{* _escape_json((_body.body or "")..(((_body.title or "")~="" and (_body.body or "")~="") and "" or "")) *},"title":{* _escape_json(_body.title or "") *}}
